title: What Godly Humility and Quiet Confidence Actually Share
caption:
Somewhere along the way, humility got confused with shrinking. Scripture never taught that.

Jesus flipped tables and washed feet in the same week. Humility bent his knee. It never shut his mouth. A humble man can lead the conversation without needing to win it, speak with conviction and still hold the outcome loosely.

"Whoever exalts himself will be humbled, and whoever humbles himself will be exalted." (Matthew 23:12) That's a promise about position, not a command to hide. Taking the seat you were given isn't pride. Performing smallness to seem holy isn't humility, it's just a different costume for the same fear.

The real test isn't how he acts in the room. It's how he acts when the room can't do anything for him.

A humble man takes up exactly the space God gave him. No more. No less.

#faith #christianmen #humility #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #character
